body.title: Rotate db_queries.log (13M) — daily cap or rolling window
body.result: Lowered RotatingFileHandler cap 50MB→10MB in logging_setup.py, added 10MB rotation check to db_proxy._db_log(), wrote lab/claudecode/log_rotate.py standalone script. Ran --run to truncate 3 oversized files.
body.description:
Day-close audit 2026-04-23 found db_queries.log at 13M (over 10M threshold). cognition.log + memory.log + utility_closet.log all approaching. Add daily rotation or rolling-tail in lab/claudecode/log_rotate.py-shaped helper.

**Affected files:** TBD — likely new lab/claudecode/log_rotate.py + cron entry.
**Test plan:** logs auto-rotate at >10M and stay below cap.
